news.t: Motley Fool Asset Management To Launch Series of New ETFs to Complete Core Portfolio Allocations
Motley Fool Asset Management Launches Two New Index-Based ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TMFE is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 6.88%, Alphabet at 5.72%, NVIDIA at 5.35%, Apple at 5.33%, and Amazon.com at 5.11%.

overview.description: The Motley Fool Capital Efficiency 100 Index ETF (TMFE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Motley Fool Capital Efficiency 100 index. The fund seeks to track an index of 100 US stocks selected based on fundamental criteria of company growth, profitability, and stability. Weighting of holdings are determined by a combination of capital efficiency score and market-cap. TMFE was launched on Dec 29, 2021 and is issued by The Motley Fool.
